products.name: Burro da centrifuga

trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2026 guide recommends butter made by centrifugation for superior quality, taste, and texture.
